content:
A new class of intelligence has arrived with GPT-5.5, designed to handle real-world tasks and power autonomous agents. It advances how we interact with AI by enabling deeper reasoning, tool use, and end-to-end task completion.

• GPT-5.5 excels at coding, research, data analysis, document creation, and operating software across platforms
• It maintains speed while outperforming prior versions, with lower latency and higher efficiency in token usage
• Improved inference in ChatGPT allows faster, more capable performance, especially in complex, iterative tasks
• Early users describe it as a collaborative “research partner,” particularly effective with contextual inputs and plugins
